# Project notes

## 2025-06-01 meeting

- Decision: adopt CDCC as primary method for breakup calculations [@smith2023benchmark]
- Consensus: IAV-CDCC outperforms standard CDCC for transfer-induced breakup
- Open question: how to handle three-body continuum in the d+93Nb system
- Failed: attempt to reproduce Lee 2024 survey results with default parameters — need to revisit their method section [@lee2024survey]

## 2025-06-03 lab log

- Finding: breakup cross section decreases by 15\% when including non-elastic channels
- Decision: switch to iterative solver for large coupled-channel systems
